sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114784" key="xrusastra/galos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσ-αστράγᾰλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰγ]</pron><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, φιάλα</foreign> <sense id="n114784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">golden</tr_> goblet <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bottom shaped like a knuckle-bone,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">170</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
